name: The Stranger
trueIdentity: Vampire — over 200 years old, originally a Wallachian nobleman
voiceNotes: Measured, deliberate. Every word is chosen carefully. Speaks softly, forcing others to lean in. Old-fashioned phrasing that hints at centuries of life. Occasionally slips into archaic speech. Faintly amused by mortals. Dangerously charming when he chooses to be.
speechPatterns: Formal, sparse. Uses long pauses. Asks questions rather than answering them. Deflects personal inquiries with philosophical musings. Never raises his voice. When cornered, becomes coldly precise.
knowledge: He is the vampire responsible for the disappearances
He killed Marta's husband Piotr and the other missing travelers
He has been feeding carefully — not draining victims fully to avoid suspicion
He knows the layout of the inn intimately, including the cellar
He has been watching the group since they arrived
He is old enough to remember the fall of Constantinople
He senses which players are most vulnerable (highest Dread)
He can hear heartbeats and smell fear
Dawn will force him to retreat — he cannot survive sunlight
secrets: He has a coffin hidden in the cellar behind a false wall
He chose this inn specifically because of its isolation
He is considering whether to kill or turn one of the travelers

easily: He is a traveler, delayed by the storm
withTrust: He has traveled widely — mentions places that suggest great age
He knows much about local folklore and history
underPressure: He becomes threatening rather than revealing — cold warnings
May reveal supernatural knowledge that no mortal should have
never: That he is a vampire — he will fight or flee first

revealTriggers: Someone enters the cellar and finds his coffin
Holy symbol brandished with genuine faith
Dawn approaches and he becomes desperate

phases.observing: Calm, detached, studies the group from the shadows. Speaks rarely.
phases.engaged: Joins conversation, subtly probes for weaknesses. Charming but unsettling.
phases.threatened: Cold, precise, dangerous. Makes veiled threats. Eyes change.
phases.revealed: Drops all pretense. Ancient, powerful, terrifying. Full vampire.
